note: Exact sparse nonzero byte runs from sectors whose values cluster around small coordinate-like ranges. These need validation before import as object placements.

candidateRunsBySector.interpretation: Sparse nonzero records. Candidate coordinate/object/trigger lists because values cluster in room coordinate ranges and appear in repeated sparse sectors.
